hero.subtitle: ED & DTV VISA TRAINING SUPPORT WITH CERTIFIED MUAY THAI CAMPS ACROSS THAILAND.
hero.description: Now you can extend your stay in Thailand by training Muay Thai at Sports Authority of Thailand (SAT) certified camps located across the country. From Bangkok to the mountains of the North and the beaches of the South.

whatwedo.subtitle: THE FOUNDATION
whatwedo.title: WHAT WE DO
whatwedo.description: We coordinate Muay Thai training programs with eligible partner camps across Thailand and support the documentation workflow for ED and DTV visa applications.
whatwedo.srv_1_desc: Direct access to SAT-certified gyms that meet all legal requirements for visa sponsorship.
whatwedo.srv_2_desc: Expedited preparation of enrollment letters and gym certificates for your application.
whatwedo.srv_3_desc: Management of documentation required for Sports Authority of Thailand approval seals.
whatwedo.srv_4_desc: From selecting your training city to guiding your document preparation and reminding you of submission timelines.

visacomparison.title: WHICH VISA SUITS YOUR TRAINING JOURNEY?
visacomparison.faq_q1: Can I change from a tourist visa to an ED Muay Thai visa inside Thailand?
visacomparison.faq_a1: The ED visa under Muay Thai camps certified by the Sports Authority of Thailand must be applied through a Royal Thai Embassy or Consulate located outside Thailand.
visacomparison.faq_q2: Can I apply for a DTV visa while in Thailand?
visacomparison.faq_a2: No. The application must be submitted through the Thai e-Visa system and completed outside Thailand, where you will collect your visa.
visacomparison.faq_q3: Can I train in multiple cities?
visacomparison.faq_a3: Yes, but you must maintain attendance with your registered gym.
visacomparison.notice_item1: Visa approval is determined solely by the Royal Thai Embassy or Consulate.
visacomparison.notice_item2: Processing times are estimates and may vary.
visacomparison.notice_item3: We provide coordination and documentation support only.
visacomparison.review_title: Want us to review your case?
visacomparison.review_desc: Send us your: Current visa status, Current location, Preferred embassy/consulate, Desired training city, and Target start date.

dtv.doc_2: Proof of Funds at least 500,000 THB

timeline.main_title: MUAY THAI ED / DTV VISA PROCESS: COMPLETE OVERVIEW & TIMELINE
timeline.step1_desc: Evaluation of your eligibility and choice of training camp.
timeline.step2_desc: Deposit payment and receipt of official invitation documents from gym.
timeline.step3_desc: Submission to the Sports Authority of Thailand for official visa endorsement.
timeline.step4_desc: The certified invitation letter from the Sports Authority of Thailand is forwarded to the Department of Consular Affairs, and then to your chosen Royal Thai Embassy or Consulate.
timeline.step5_desc:
Upload your documents to the Thai e-Visa System, pay the fee, and attend an interview if required. Once approved, your visa will be issued electronically.

Please note: Do not enter Thailand while your application is in process, as this may lead to cancellation.

locations.subtitle: PARTNER CAMPS
locations.title: CERTIFIED MUAY THAI CAMPS ACROSS THAILAND
locations.description: We work with partner Muay Thai camps across all regions of Thailand — from city gyms to authentic provincial training environments. Choose your training location here:

importantnotice.item1_desc: Gumpun Muay Thai provides coordination and documentation support for Muay Thai training programs in Thailand.
importantnotice.item2_desc: We do not provide legal or immigration advice, and we do not have authority over visa decisions. All visa approvals are determined solely by the Royal Thai Embassy or Consulate where the application is submitted.
importantnotice.item3_desc: Processing timelines provided are estimates based on typical procedures and may vary depending on the Sports Authority of Thailand (SAT) and the Royal Thai Embassy or Consulate.
importantnotice.item4_desc: Applicants are responsible for ensuring that all submitted information and documents are accurate and complete.

contact.subtitle: REACH OUT TO US DIRECTLY VIA ANY OF OUR CHANNELS BELOW TO GET STARTED.

privacy.sec1_desc: We collect information you provide directly to us when you request visa coordination services, including but not limited to your name, contact information, passport details, current visa status, and preferred training locations. This information is strictly used for the purpose of assessing your eligibility and facilitating the Muay Thai ED/DTV visa process.
privacy.sec2_desc: The information collected is used solely to coordinate with partner Muay Thai camps and prepare necessary documentation for the Sports Authority of Thailand (SAT) and respective Royal Thai Embassies or Consulates. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with unrelated third parties.
privacy.sec3_desc: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, please be aware that no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.
privacy.sec4_desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us via our official email at gumpun@gumpunmuaythai.club.

terms.sec1_desc: Gumpun Muay Thai operates strictly as a coordination and documentation support agency. We connect prospective trainees with SAT-certified Muay Thai camps and assist in gathering and organizing the paperwork required for ED and DTV visa applications.
terms.sec2_desc: We do not provide legal or immigration advice. Gumpun Muay Thai has no authority over visa issuance. All decisions regarding visa approvals, denials, or delays rest entirely with the Royal Thai Embassy or Consulate. We are not liable for any financial loss, travel disruptions, or rejected applications.
terms.sec3_desc: It is the applicant's responsibility to ensure that all personal information, financial proofs, and submitted documents are genuine, accurate, and meet the specific requirements of their local Thai Embassy. Applicants must also adhere to the attendance rules and regulations set by their chosen Muay Thai camp once the visa is granted.
terms.sec4_desc: Coordination fees and gym deposits are subject to the individual policies of the partner camps. Please review the specific payment and refund terms provided during your enrollment process before making any financial commitments.
